blocks.text: Åberg leads THE PLAYERS, Arsenal leads the league — Saturday is stacked

Hovland trails leader Åberg by seven shots after R3 at TPC Sawgrass. And Bodo/Glimt's 3-0 demolition of Sporting CP in the CL on Wednesday has Norwegian football purring — now the PL title race picks up the baton.
⚽ Sun 17:30 — Liverpool vs Tottenham at Anfield — could this settle the title?
